_patch_meta.description: Update word_registry.dimensions for registry 112 — mind. Replaces single-value source_category with multi-value comma-delimited dimensions derived from Session B analysis per WA-Reference-v5.1 Section 4.3.

operations.description: Dimensions for registry 112 mind: Cognitive/Mind (primary — thinking, memory, reasoning, orientation); Volitional (boulē/boulomai, na.dav, ye.tser, metanoeō); Relational/Social (shared-mind vocabulary, suneidēsis in community, na.cham comfort, remembrance in prayer); Spiritual/God-ward (za.khar covenant memory, nous renewal Rom 12:2, mind of Christ 1Cor 2:16, law on dianoia Heb 8:10); Moral/Conscience (suneidēsis 29v, moral evaluation of thought throughout cha.shav corpus, ye.tser moral disposition).
